Most people think AI search starts when someone opens ChatGPT.

It starts weeks earlier.

Every article, citation, review, mention, and reference becomes evidence AI can use later.

By the time someone asks a question, your reputation has already been built

#seo #AISearch #geo

Ranking once is good.

Ranking FOUR times for the same keyword is even better.

Imagine owning:

→ Google's AI Overview
→ A YouTube video
→ A blog article
→ A forum discussion

One keyword.

Multiple touchpoints.

That's how authority compounds. https://t.co/E2nnYx2qUV

Claude AI SEO did it again 🤯

One keyword. Four spots on Google.

AI overview, video, article, and forum post.

That’s not SEO. That’s Google getting jump-scared.

Link in the comments. https://t.co/G5YZtQ69Gs

Ranking #1 on Google’s AI Overview is the new gold rush.

Stop losing 61% of your clicks to the answer box.
No more waiting months for a single article to rank.
Here’s the AI Overview play 👇

→ Target the sub-questions Google asks behind the scenes.
→ Deploy a 5-pillar content https://t.co/xqYvmMDmMU
